title: OR Tambo travellers warned about access changes and parking closures
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - Residents, motorists and travellers are urged to take note of several road closures that will be in effect at OR Tambo International Airport tomorrow.

Kempton Express reports that, according to Airports Company South Africa (Acsa), Cargo Road will only be accessible via Voortrekker Road leading to the SAA Cargo Area.


## Expect delays


Motorists are advised to expect delays and plan ahead.

Those making use of the Arrivals Road will be rerouted to Parkade 2 North and South for all drop-offs and pick-ups.

Traffic in and around the arrivals section is expected to be heavier than usual due to the closures.


## Parking changes


In addition, short-term parking at the Piazza will be completely closed.

Travellers can stay informed with real-time updates via the Acsa mobile app and on Acsa’s official social media channels throughout the day.

Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
